name: Test Monthly target
query:
select
AA.SALESPERSON, AA.CUSTOMER, AA.CUSTOMERNAME
,(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep + YTD.oct + YTD.nov + YTD.dec + YTD.jan + YTD.feb + YTD.mar) as "TargetFullYear:Currency",
(case when monthname(%(date)s)="April" Then 0 
when monthname(%(date)s)="May" Then round(YTD.apr)
when monthname(%(date)s)="June" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may)
when monthname(%(date)s)="July" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun)
when monthname(%(date)s)="August" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul)
when monthname(%(date)s)="September" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug)
when monthname(%(date)s)="October" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep)
when monthname(%(date)s)="November" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep + YTD.oct)
when monthname(%(date)s)="December" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep + YTD.oct + YTD.nov)
when monthname(%(date)s)="January" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep + YTD.oct + YTD.nov + YTD.dec)
when monthname(%(date)s)="February" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep + YTD.oct + YTD.nov + YTD.dec + YTD.jan)
when monthname(%(date)s)="March" Then round(YTD.apr + YTD.may + YTD.jun + YTD.jul + YTD.aug + YTD.sep + YTD.oct + YTD.nov + YTD.dec + YTD.jan + YTD.feb)
Else 0 end) as "YTD TARGET:Currency",
(select SUM(SI.total) from `tabSales Invoice` SI
inner join `tabSales Team` ST on ST.parent = SI.name
where SI.company = %(company)s and YTD.customer = SI.customer and ST.sales_person = YT.sales_person and SI.posting_date >= YT.start_date and SI.posting_date <= %(date)s and SI.docstatus = 1) as "YTD ACTUAL:Currency",
(select MTD.amount from `tabMonthly Target` MT
inner join `tabMonthly Target Details` MTD on MTD.parent = MT.name
where MT.month = monthname(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) and MT.year = (case when monthname(%(date)s) = 'January' then year(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) else year(%(date)s) end) and YTD.customer = MTD.customer and MT.sales_person = YT.sales_person and MT.docstatus = 1)"PREVIOUS MONTH TARGET:Currency",
(select SUM(SI.total) from `tabSales Invoice` SI
inner join `tabSales Team` ST on ST.parent = SI.name
where SI.company = %(company)s and ST.sales_person = YT.sales_person and YTD.customer = SI.customer and monthname(SI.posting_date) = monthname(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) and year(SI.posting_date) = (case when monthname(%(date)s) = 'January' then year(DATE_SUB(%(date)s, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) else year(%(date)s) end) and SI.docstatus = 1) as "PREVIOUS MONTH ACTUAL:Currency",
(select MTD.amount from `tabMonthly Target` MT
inner join `tabMonthly Target Details` MTD on MTD.parent = MT.name
where monthname(%(date)s)= MT.month and year(%(date)s)=MT.year and YTD.customer = MTD.customer and MT.docstatus = 1)"CURRENT MONTH TARGET:Currency",
(select SUM(SI.total) from `tabSales Invoice` SI
inner join `tabSales Team` ST on ST.parent = SI.name
where SI.company = %(company)s and ST.sales_person = YT.sales_person and YTD.customer = SI.customer and monthname(%(date)s)= monthname(SI.posting_date) and year(%(date)s)= year(SI.posting_date) and SI.docstatus = 1) as "CURRENT MONTH ACTUAL:Currency"
from (

select
MT.sales_person as "SALESPERSON",
MTD.customer as "CUSTOMER",
MTD.customer_name as "CUSTOMERNAME"
from `tabMonthly Target` as MT
inner join `tabMonthly Target Details` as MTD on MT.name = MTD.parent
where MT.company=%(company)s and MT.docstatus = 1 and MT.month = monthname(%(date)s) and MT.year = year(%(date)s)
group by MTD.customer
) AA
left outer join `tabSales Person Yearly Target Details` as YTD on YTD.customer = AA.CUSTOMER
left outer join `tabYearly Target` as YT on  YT.name = YTD.parent

order by AA.CUSTOMERNAME
